metadata.description: The create-cmp marketplace — Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform scaffolding, toolchain bootstrap, and QA bring-up for Claude Code.

plugins.name: create-cmp
plugins.description: Start a new Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform app (Android + iOS) by conversation. Interviews you for platforms, package, Firebase/auth, Room, and bottom-nav tabs, then shells out to the deterministic create-cmp engine to stamp a frozen, version-locked golden template — navigation/insets pre-solved, Clean Architecture wired, test pyramid + Maestro E2E flows + verify lane included — and proves a GREEN build before reporting success. Also ships the cmp-inspector: an AI-native Compose UI inspector (MCP server + skill) that reads a running screen as structured JSON — hierarchy, geometry, and resolved design tokens, never screenshots — to debug layout and catch design-token drift mechanically. Bundles four skills: cmp-new (scaffold by interview), cmp-doctor (install the JDK/Android SDK/AVD/Xcode/CocoaPods/XcodeGen toolchain, consent-gated), cmp-qa-prep (bring up the emulator + the Maestro smoke), and cmp-inspect (inspect the Compose UI as design data). Same engine as the `create-cmp-cli` npm package (`npx create-cmp-cli`).
